name: Content Strategy
description: Build a content strategy from scratch: understand the audience, position the brand, design the funnel, create copy frameworks, and plan growth.

steps.name: Audience Research
steps.description: Build content audience persona with pain points and interests

steps.name: Brand Positioning
steps.description: Define brand voice and market positioning for content

steps.name: Content Funnel
steps.description: Design content funnel stages (awareness → consideration → conversion)

steps.name: Copy Frameworks
steps.description: Generate headline templates, CTAs, and email subject lines

steps.name: Distribution Plan
steps.description: Plan content distribution channels and growth experiments

success_criteria: Distribution plan with channels and timeline
